summary: Set 049 Session 5 (final) shipped the docs + version bumps + close-out per spec §5 S5. CLAUDE.md: the 'Hard-coordination enforcement (Sets 033 / 036) is OFF by default' section retired entirely; new 'Orchestrator-block contract (post-Set-049)' section documents the 4-field omit-null shape (engine/provider/model/effort), the historical-record-not-check-out framing, the surviving D3 writer-bypass detector, and the P4 Explorer revert; Extension versioning section updated with v0.24.0 description and Previous/Pre-Previous/Pre-Pre-Previous walk demotion. docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md: 'Orchestrator check-out / check-in (Set 033)' section (114 lines) replaced with 'Orchestrator identity and concurrency (post-Set-049)' covering the post-rip contract; Step-8-area cross-reference at ~line 1770 rewritten. PyPI dabbler-ai-router bumped 0.10.0 → 0.11.0 (pyproject.toml + ai_router/__init__.py __version__ — the latter caught a pre-existing skip from Set 048's 0.10.0 release); CHANGELOG entry added with full Breaking / Changed / Removed / Kept sections; retroactive backfill of [0.8.0] / [0.9.0] / [0.10.0] entries that were missed during their respective sets. Marketplace dabbler-ai-orchestration bumped 0.23.0 → 0.24.0; CHANGELOG entry added with same structure; .vsix packaged at 927.58 KB / 22 files after a .vscodeignore hygiene tweak (added test-results/** + playwright-report/** so Playwright artifacts no longer bloat the published package). change-log.md authored with per-session narrative covering S1-S5 + commit references + cumulative cost ($0.0475 / $10 NTE = 0.48% through S4). 17-item UAT checklist at 049-orchestrator-coordination-removal-uat-checklist.json covering orchestrator-block shape (Full + Lightweight), CLI backward compatibility, new_chat_id retirement, migrator sweep+normalize, Explorer surface revert, Command Palette retirement, writer-bypass detector, cancel/restore lifecycle, and consumer-repo notice — 11 items verified programmatically in S5, 6 flagged as manual operator UAT post-publish. Test results: Python 967 passing + 1 skipped + 0 regressions in 207.73s; TypeScript Layer-1 553 passing + 2 pre-existing failures unrelated to S5 (configEditor-foundation vscode-stub gap + notificationsSection regex stale, both confirmed via the S4 git-stash baseline). Both publishes are operator-gated tag-pushes per the publish-via-github-actions discipline: push v0.11.0 for PyPI and vsix-v0.24.0 for Marketplace when ready. The wheel + .vsix are built locally as smoke checks only.
